parentJobId.description: Identifier of the parent job, if this is a child job

status.description: Exit status code of the job. A value of 0 indicates success.

policyName.description: Name of the policy associated with the job

policyType.description: Type of the policy (e.g., Standard, VMware, Oracle)

scheduleName.description: Name of the schedule that triggered the job

clientName.description: Hostname of the client being backed up or restored

mediaServer.description: Hostname of the media server processing the job

storageUnit.description: Name of the storage unit used by the job

endTime.description: Timestamp when the job completed or was last updated

currentOperation.description: Description of the operation currently being performed

attempt.description: Current attempt number for the job

restartable.description: Whether the job can be restarted

suspendable.description: Whether the job can be suspended

resumable.description: Whether the job can be resumed

cancellable.description: Whether the job can be cancelled
